raw.message: Last year we gave away $33M in FanCash rewards. Our accountant Fran says that's irresponsible. Players disagree.

hook.summary: An accountant reacts with anger to a high payout figure.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a white shirt and black vest looks at a document and shouts.
hook.text_overlay: OVER $33M IN FANCASH REWARDS LAST YEAR
hook.voiceover_transcript: Okay. Whose dumb idea was this?

scene_flow: Fran, the Director of Accounting, reviews a document showing $33M in rewards.
Fran shouts in disbelief and frustration at the high payout amount.
The Fanatics Casino logo appears over the scene.
Fran continues to gesture angrily while legal disclaimers appear at the bottom.
on_screen_text: OVER $33M IN FANCASH REWARDS LAST YEAR
Must be 21+. GAMBLING PROBLEM? CALL 1-800-GAMBLER. Paid endorsement. Total FanCash rewards varies by month. Cash terms apply. See Fanatics Casino app.
audience_proxy: Adult sports fans and casual gamblers 21+ looking for high-payout casino platforms.
